category_sources: source_facts.description says MonetDB is a column-store database; official MonetDB site describes it as a high performance relational database system for analytics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is monetdb; official site and documentation use MonetDB.
docs_sources: Official MonetDB documentation is hosted at monetdb.org/documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official MonetDB Mercurial guide lists https://dev.monetdb.org/hg/MonetDB/ as the central MonetDB repository, and monetdb.org/hg indexes MonetDB repositories.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says column-store database; official MonetDB site and docs describe SQL, relational database, and analytics use cases.
